creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
Can we have this ticket resolved some time soon, please? BTW, 2.2.4 is currently the latest from the upstream :)

It seems like NumPy-1.x is not even working with Python-3.12, which, given the pace at which portmgr is obsoleting things, may soon become _the_ Python on FreeBSD...
